name: Slurm Job Array Patterns
summary: Run parameter sweeps and many independent tasks with Slurm job arrays.
description: This skill helps users turn a manifest of independent inputs into a bounded Slurm job array with per-task logging, concurrency limits, and restart-friendly task selection.

inputs.name: task_manifest
inputs.description: Tab-separated manifest with one independent task per line.

inputs.name: array_range
inputs.description: Slurm array range and optional concurrency cap, such as 1-100%10.

inputs.name: resources
inputs.description: Per-task CPU, memory, wall-time, partition, and account requests.

outputs.name: per_task_logs
outputs.description: Separate stdout/stderr logs for each array task.

outputs.name: task_outputs
outputs.description: User-defined output files keyed by task id or sample id.

tests.description: Validate the manifest and referenced examples.
Run sbatch --test-only if available, then submit a 1-3 task array on a short test partition.
